flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at University of Puerto Rico at Ponce vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.3k vs 3.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico at Ponce fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico at Ponce rose 51% between 2021 and 2024 (10.3% → 15.5%).
